steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage states, "Given that the percentage of Quito respondents who reported living within a 10-minute walk of a park was much lower than that reported by Lima respondents, greater proximity alone can’t explain the difference in park use." This is the decisive claim: it directly challenges proximity as the sole cause of higher park use in Quito.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Choice B aligns with the signal by asserting the difference is "caused by something other than" proximity.

The other three either contradict the passage’s claim (A: no mention of researcher expectations; C: inaccuracies not discussed; D: predated sources not mentioned).

This points directly to B as correct. That matches choice B — B is correct.
